Launch Summary:
▪ Kami McBride – For almost 30 years, Kami has been teaching people to grow
and use herbs in their daily lives for cooking, gardening, skin care and stress
reduction. She works to de-mystify the world of herbal medicine, and loves
helping people learn how to use herbs in the home setting for prevention and
every day common ailments.
▪ Email list: approximately 6,500 (built from teaching at workshops, conferences
and colleges)
▪ Market/Niche: Health and wellness, family wellness, children’s wellness, Mom’s
wanting to use natural remedies to take care of their family
▪ Product Name Created during Seed Launch: Handcrafted Healing Herbal
Oils - The simple, homemade solution for non-toxic natural skin care and the
family friendly remedy for dozens of common aches and pains, from burns and
bruises to eczema and muscle pain
▪ Offer price: $97
▪ Sales: 104 people purchased course with 0 refunds
▪ Total revenue: $10,088
▪ Program Delivery: “My courses are hands-on demonstrations, so I pre-
recorded 3 videos before the class started so people would have something to
begin with. I would release a few videos and then take a survey.
After each survey I organized all of the questions and then did a live call
answering the questions that were submitted and also taking live questions and
comments on the calls.

ability to deliver content will outstrip the ability of people to absorb that
content, so you can do things like take breaks.
